changeSet.author: rshmidt
changeSet.sql:
drop table if exists users;; create table users ( id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), email varchar(512) unique, password_hash text, first_name varchar(256), last_name varchar(256), role varchar(512) default 'USER', status varchar(512) default 'ACTIVE', registered_at timestamp default now(),
constraint uq_users_email unique (email) );;
